summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Open PRs are kept, routed to maintainer judgment only where the hydrated evidence shows an unresolved maintainer/product/technical decision, and already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep-closed actions. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined with route_security.
